# Transcript
PAR
NTESOP
*TA OSA
*I QEOFRAS
WI EIS THM BOH
ANTA DEDOCQAI 
ON META QEOFRAS
XIN THN EUHFISM
KAI EIS THN ENKYK*
WI ENIAYTWI TWI MET*
*MIZESQAI AYTOYS EI
TAYTAEWS AN KOMISWNTA
DE TOYTWI TWI CRONWI MH E
E STRATHGWI MHTE ALLWI H
N MHT* ALLO MHQENMHDE TOIS *
*ATATATAXAIEN TWI CRONWI TO
SWNTAI TENEDIOI TA CRHMATA A
SIN OS AN KAI EIS TON LOIPO*
OI TE SYMMACOI KAI ALLOS OST
DHMWI TWI AQHNAIWN OTI O DHM
MELETAI DIKAIWS TOIS PR
CWN TA SYMFERONTA TWI DH
TOIS SYMMACOISEPAIN
NEDIN KAI STEFANWS
I APO CILIWN DRAC
S THS S TON DH*
ACOYSEPA*
N ARAON K*
WI EPNE
*NEO
